DISCOVERY 302, DEFENDANTS MOHAMED ELHILAA AND MARTIN SMITH'S MOTION FOR AN ORDER DIRECTING JAPERA JENKINS TO APPEAR FOR A DEPOSITION IS GRANTED. JAPERA JENKINS SHALL APPEAR AT HER DEPOSITION ON MAY 10, 2013 AT THE OFFICE OF COUNSEL FOR DEFENDANTS. NO SANCTIONS ARE AWARDED. THE APPROPRIATE REMEDY FOR DAMAGES IS PURSUANT TO CCP 2020.240. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE PRO TEM: THOMAS A. COHEN; CLERK L. FONG; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (302/JPT)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Plaintiff To Provide Full And Complete Responses To Request For Inspection And Production Of Documents
Off Calendar Sep-06-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance(s) on FRI-SEP-06-2013:
Jodie G. Steinberg, Esq. of Clasen, Raffalow & Rhoads [877.707.7992] appearing for Defendants MOHAMED ELHILAA and MARTIN SMITH; No other appearances.

The Court adopts its tentative ruling. Defendants MOHAMED ELHILAA'S and MARTIN SMITH'S Motion to Compel Plaintiff to Provide Full and Complete Responses to Request for Inspection and Production of Documents is granted. Order signed in open court. Judge Pro Tem: Paul A. Renne; Clerk L. Fong; matter not reported. (302/JPT)

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Apr-25-2013 Continued To Sep-23-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion For An Order Directing Japera Jenkins To Appear For A Deposition
Off Calendar May-03-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance: William E. Jemmott, Esq. of Clasen, Raffalow & Rhoads (877.707.7992) appearing for MOHAMED ELHILAA and MARTIN SMITH, defendants and moving parties; No Other Appearance(s).

Tentative ruling is adopted. DEFENDANTS MOHAMED ELHILAA and MARTIN SMITH'S Motion for an Order Directing Japera Jenkins to Appear for a Deposition is granted. Japera Jenkins shall appear at her deposition on May 10, 2013 at the office of counsel for defendants. No sanctions are awarded. The appropriate remedy for damages is pursuant to CCP 2020.240. Order signed in open court. Judge Pro Tem: Thomas A. Cohen; Clerk L. Fong; matter not reported. (302/JPT)
